entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Individual knowledgeable about blocks in a knowledge system

entities.name: Block ID
entities.context: Identifier for a specific block in the knowledge system

entities.name: domain
entities.context: Field or area that the block pertains to

entities.name: voice profile
entities.context: Characteristics of the communicative style for the block

entities.name: auto-approve threshold
entities.context: Criteria for automatic approval of the block

entities.name: QA Checklist
entities.context: Tool for quality assurance before publishing

relationships.context: V understands the role of Block ID in the system
V is knowledgeable about the different domains of blocks
V is familiar with the voice characteristics of the blocks
V understands the criteria for automatic approval
V uses the QA Checklist for ensuring quality before publishing
